About

01 — Profile

I'm a Digital Communication and Marketing graduate (110/110 cum laude) with hands-on experience in institutional communication, social media strategy and editorial planning. At Confindustria Veneto Est I manage content across channels, coordinate high-profile projects and support events that bring together business leaders and institutional representatives.

Through internships across different sectors and a multicultural academic path between Italy and Spain, I've built solid interpersonal skills and a natural aptitude for teamwork and collaboration. I'm passionate about creating engaging digital content, and I'm looking for my next step within an international team, ideally abroad, where I can keep learning and contribute to meaningful projects.

I believe communication works best when strategy and sensibility move together — one gives it direction, the other gives it a voice.

— Ilenia
  • LocationVenice, Italy
  • EducationMA Web Marketing & Digital Comm., IUSVE (110/110 cum laude)
  • LanguagesItalian, English, Spanish, German
  • FocusSocial media strategy, editorial planning, institutional comms
  • ToolsMeta Business Suite, Canva Pro, Adobe CC, Brevo, Google Ads/Analytics

Projects

04 — Selected work

A closer look at the campaigns, events and research projects I've shaped — spanning institutional communication, luxury branding and academic strategy work.

01 Professional Project

Confindustria Veneto Est

Digital communication & event management

Social MediaEvents

At Confindustria Veneto Est, I help shape the association's digital identity through an integrated communication strategy that moves fluidly between content creation, event planning and on-site coordination.

My work spans a wide range of institutional moments: from the Port of Venice open day, where I produced the social content and helped organise the event itself — including printed materials, invitations and guest follow-up — to the Welcome Day for new member companies, where I supported both the planning and the on-site logistics.

I also led the social media rollout for two flagship campaigns: "Facciamo Squadra", in which ten entrepreneurs share their stories through 50-second videos, for which I coordinated the shooting days, wrote the interview scripts and oversaw every edit; and "Connessioni", a talks series exploring unexpected dialogues about the future, for which I handled the graphics and copywriting.

Alongside these, I produced the social content for the Olimpiade dei Talenti Meccatronici in Padua and for Sustainability Week, during which I also managed the collaboration with a series of guest podcasters.

More highlights from this project · click to read more
I produced the social content for this open day and helped organise the event itself — from printed materials and invitations to guest follow-up.
A talks series featuring historian Alessandro Barbero and other guests, exploring unexpected dialogues about the future. I handled the graphics and copywriting for the social rollout.
An onboarding event for new member companies, where I supported both the planning and the on-site logistics.
Ten entrepreneurs share their stories in 50-second videos. I coordinated the shooting days, wrote the interview scripts and oversaw every edit.
A mechatronics talent competition in Padua, for which I supported the event management and produced the social content.
02 Professional Project

Vetreria Artistica Rosa

Brochure & promotional material design

BrandingGraphic Design

I created photorealistic renders of chandeliers using generative AI, placing the products in different interior settings to help clients visualise each piece in their own space.

I designed brochures and promotional materials for INDEX Dubai 2025, one of the leading international interior design fairs, tailored to highlight artisanal quality in a global luxury context.

I also developed style-based catalogues for the brand's chandelier collections — Floral, Ca' Rezzonici, Liberty and Modern.

More highlights from this project · click to read more
On-site at INDEX Dubai, one of the leading international interior design fairs, where the brand's chandelier collections were exhibited to a global luxury audience.
03 Professional Project

Gioielleria Nardi

Digital communication & newsletters for the luxury sector

BrandingSocial Media

During my internship at Gioielleria Nardi, a historic Venetian luxury jewelry maison, I analysed the brand's digital communication to strengthen its online identity.

I developed a newsletter strategy using Brevo, managed a CRM segmented by geographic target, and proposed visual content ideas to narrate the brand's artisanal heritage.

I also suggested improvements to the website, Instagram and LinkedIn to ensure consistency with the brand's luxury positioning.

04 University Project

Lavazza — Tales of Italy

Launch event campaign

EventsSocial MediaBranding

For Lavazza's launch of "Tales of Italy" — four new coffee blends inspired by Milan, Venice, Rome and Naples — my team designed the national campaign and its rollout across four cities, working from the brand's own creative brief.

The centrepiece was "Colazione con Delitto", an immersive breakfast murder-mystery in Piazza Duomo, Milan: 24 tables split into four blend-themed areas for 240 guests and twelve local influencers, with actors staging a mystery for guests to solve over pastries by chef Fabrizio Fiorani.

For Venice, Rome and Naples, we developed a lighter touring format pairing tastings with a hands-on ceramic cup-painting station and a branded photo booth, rolled out through the rest of the year. I also contributed to the campaign's claim and jingle: "Lavazza, l'Italia in ogni tazza."

More highlights from this project · click to read more
Two branded Ape-car mobile bars, inspired by the 1959 Carrozzeria Boneschi autobar built for Lavazza, touring Milan to hand out coffee and event flyers.
Two custom routes wove through Milan's landmarks — Duomo, Brera, Parco Sempione, Porta Venezia and the Navigli — introducing the new blends to bars across the city.
05 University Project

Antica Murano

Social media management & content creation

Social MediaGraphic Design

As team leader for a Social Media Marketing course, I managed the Instagram and Facebook pages for Antica Murano, aiming to improve its online presence.

After analysing the brand's mission, vision and values, I conducted a competitor analysis and identified weaknesses in the existing social strategy.

We created video content focused on the craftsmanship and beauty of Murano glass, and designed a targeted editorial calendar that led to a 400% increase in traffic and views.

06 University Project

Calzedonia

Brand language analysis

BrandingSocial Media

As part of a team, I conducted an in-depth analysis of Calzedonia's mission, vision and values, mapping its digital presence across major social platforms.

I studied the visual language used to build a high-end, stylish image, with a focus on influencer marketing promoting empowerment and well-being.

I identified areas for improvement — clearer calls to action and a more structured content flow — while preserving the brand's emotional connection with its audience.

07 University Project

Ellipticum

Marketing plan for an e-sports venture

BrandingGraphic Design

As part of a Web Marketing lab, I helped develop a launch strategy for Ellipticum, an e-sports centre concept in Switzerland.

We designed a virtual immersive arena accessible through VR headsets, where users could create custom avatars, and proposed a virtual currency, a virtual make-up room, a themed disco and exclusive podcasts to enrich the experience.

08 University Project

VeniSIA

Marketing plan

Social MediaBrandingEvents

Together with my team, I created an integrated marketing strategy for VeniSIA, a Venice-based startup accelerator focused on sustainable innovation.

The goal was to position VeniSIA as an innovation hub attracting both startups and investors. I curated the Instagram and Facebook presence, designed video podcasts and reels with Venetian themes, and coordinated collaborations with events such as the Venice Biennale.

We also proposed city-branding initiatives to attract young talent through partnerships and events.

More highlights from this project · click to read more
A video podcast concept hosted by a green influencer, interviewing startuppers and newcomers who rebuilt their lives in Venice — distributed across Spotify and YouTube.
A social series announcing three provocative public installations across Venice's main squares, playfully confronting stereotypes about the city's acqua alta.
The Gantt-chart media plan mapping institutional, offline and online activities across the full campaign timeline.
